text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I... ran away. Yeah, that's right. I ran away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Everyone else faced the Mejiro name in their own
way. But I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I just ran. I wasn't strong enough to face the thing
I'm supposed to love.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So I ran away... Away from the Mejiros to
somewhere I could be myself... even if that self
was weak.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: And sure enough, I found that place. But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That weakness showed itself at the spring Tenno
Sho. I couldn't show my true self because I hadn't
overcome that weakness yet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If I keep going like this, am I ever gonna be able
to be my true self?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Will I become someone that everyone'll be proud
of?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: What up, bestie?! Let's go slay at karaoke! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
We gotta get hyped before the Takarazuka
Kinen! All right? Let's go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: A-ah, sorry. I can't today...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: What, for realsies? You're no fun...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Then, how about some bubble tea?! Or we could
record an UmaTok! Or do a conveyor-belt-sushi
crawl and just get desserts?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Mmm... I don't feel like doing any of that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Compared to Daitaku Helios, she sounds rather
gloomy.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's the matter? You sick of having fun or
something?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Or, wait... Don't tell me you're sick of me?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Nah, I still love ya... Obvs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've always had so much fun with you.
So I could run away from things that are painful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've been leaning on you, and that's why I've
stayed weak...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: What are you saying...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
What's the big deal?! There's nothing wrong with
having fun! Who wouldn't want to live doing only
the things they like?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Who wouldn't want to run away from painful
things?! If you can have fun running and have fun
winning, then what's the problem?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You're stronger now, Palmster! I know it! You're
just short on confidence vibes right now, that's
all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm no stronger than before... You're just saying
that to be nice...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: You know what? Fine.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: I'm outta here! Dummy! You big dumb idiot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daitaku Helios runs off somewhere.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I thought I'd managed to run away, but I
guess I didn't make it anywhere after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wherever I go, the same old weak Palmer catches
up to me. No matter what, she'll always creep up
from behind eventually.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
McQueen and Ryan have always worked on
themselves without running away from anything.
That's why they can take pride in themselves...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But I just wanted to have a good time. I guess you
could say I haven't done my time yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Depending how you look at it, you could
probably argue that having fun is the same as
running away. All the same...
choice_data_list: I think that time was necessary for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You're saying taking time off to have fun was...
necessary?
choice_data_list:
Front runners need to catch their breath in the
middle of the race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, I see. You got a point there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I never knew how to take a step back
and breathe before, so I always felt like I was
suffocating.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But then I went over to freestyle races and
learned how fun it is to run the way you want.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I did so many things I never had before and
figured out who I really am.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I needed that time, just like you said. That's why I
was able to start over.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But ever since I did, I've felt like I'm behind
everyone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I just can't get into it while I'm here feeling like
I'm nothing compared to McQueen and Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If I can't stand up and be, like, "Running away is
the best! Eat your hearts out!" then how can I go
out and party right before a race?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The silence is heavy. She needs to find her
strength—the strength of a Mejiro who has lived
her life differently than the others...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Until she does...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. Do you have a sec?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems she's been waiting here in ambush.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us talk over everything we can
possibly do for Mejiro Palmer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer? About my next race, I'm thinking—

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hold up! We gotta talk!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios comes in humming with a low
intensity.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey, Helios... Sorry about bef—

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Don't apologize! We've got something more
important to hash out!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You've legit got something no one else has,
Palmster. All fax, no printer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: If you're trying to comfort me...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I'm not trying to comfort you! I'm speaking the
truth!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Your runaway is totally legit! No one can keep up
with you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That was just out of desperation... It was straight
up born out of my weakness.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's not exactly something I can hold up my head
and brag to my family about.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: That's not it! Running away did so much for you!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
There's so much you would never have seen if you
hadn't! Like, a stupid amount of stuff!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What? You mean there are things I've seen only because I ran away?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! You would've never met your trainer if
you hadn't run away, for one! Or me either!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
And now we've been through so much together!
And that's not about to change any time soon,
'cause what we've got is legit!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You can bet the other Mejiros don't have friends
like this. You're the only one!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I met you two because I ran... If I hadn't...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... You're right. If I had been strong from the
start, I wouldn't have met either of you... You're
something special that only I have...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
And I'm not just any friend. I know everything
about you, Palmster! ☆ Call me a expert!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You're super fast, and a bigger baddie than
anyone! ☆ Even if you don't believe in yourself, I
believe in you! Forever and ever!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Helios...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But you're just exaggerating... I'm nothing
special...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Enough of that! Get this through your head
already!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I know you waaay better than you know yourself!
You know why?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Because I love you waaay more than you love
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Helios...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
So I'm gonna keep telling you until you get it!
You're legit! You're fire! You're legit fire!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I'll tell you while you're training, while you're
taking a break, while you're in the bath, and even
before races! I'll be shouting it from the stands!
And if that's not enough...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: If that's not enough...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios pulls out a piece of paper. It's the
secret weapon we came up with in our discussion.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: I'll even shout it from right beside you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But you're right beside me now... Wait, what's
that paper?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: It's a sign-up sheet... for the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I've got a lot of followers so I can run there even
though I'm on the Mile tour.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You'd really do that? For me?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: You bet. Now... is there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Uh, is there what?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Is there any other Mejiro with a friend like me?! A
friend that'll even run your races with you?! Who'll
run right beside you if that's what it takes to get
you fired up?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: No! Because I'm...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Runaway Palmster's exclusive runaway bestie!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
My... runaway bestie...
...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Well? Whaddya think?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't that get you at least a little hyped?
Doesn't it make you kinda, I dunno, proud of me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios, the goddess of the sun who
taught Mejiro Palmer about freedom, works her
magic once more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Again, she shines her light on Mejiro Palmer,
illuminating the path we took to get where we
are.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There's no way... I wouldn't be hyped. There's no
way anyone else has someone like you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You're wild. You don't think about consequences
or pros and cons...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And you're always right by my side! There's no
one else like you in the whole world!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You said it! And I'm telling you you got it,
Palmster! You got what no one else has! You've
got me!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
And what we've got deserves to be treasured!
Together, we can take on anything!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
So whaddya think? We running the Takarazuka
Kinen or what?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hellz yeah, we're running! How could I say I no?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You wanna run with me? Run and run as far as we
can go?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Bet! If it's the two of us together...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
We can go anywhere! We've gotta go out there
and flaunt it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Let's show everyone our double-slay
runaway!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I'm gonna run in the Takarazuka Kinen! I
might not be good enough right now, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly why I was able to find a bestie to
make up for what I'm missing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Together, we're the whole package! As long as
the two of us are together, I've got all the
confidence I need to show everyone what it's
really like to party!

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeeyyy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Side by side with the friend she could only meet
because of her troubles, Mejiro Palmer is headed
to the Takarazuka Kinen.
